ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) code */,
  "admin2" TEXT /* Admin2 level (e.g., county, city) */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Province or state */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country or region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., city, county, state, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the case was reported */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the case was reported */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the case was reported */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the case was reported */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the case (e.g., government agency, healthcare provider) */,
  "first_reported" TEXT /* Date the case was first reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., active, recovered, deceased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case the metric belongs to */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations */,
  "icu_admissions" INTEGER /* Number of intensive care unit (ICU) admissions */,
  "ventilator_usage" INTEGER /* Number of ventilator usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coordinate */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location the coordinate belongs to */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coordinates_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "combined_keys" (
  "combined_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each combined key */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location the combined key belongs to */,
  "combined_key" TEXT /* Combined key (e.g., Abbeville, South Carolina, US) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("combined_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_combined_keys_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case the update belongs to */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update (e.g., 4/4/20 23:34) */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., new case, updated metric) */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government agency, healthcare provider) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Data format of the data source (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_frequency" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source the frequency belongs to */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time of day when updates are typically received */,
  "update_day" TEXT /* Day of the week when updates are typically received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_frequency_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, researcher) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Type of location (e.g., city, county, state, country)
